title: The Pentagon's Space Development Agency hasn't moved as fast as anyone would like
summary: SDA started launching prototype tracking and data transport satellites in 2023 and launched its first two batches of transport satellites last year. SDA’s transport satellites will fold into the Space Data Network to work alongside SpaceX’s satellites, Sandhoo said.
caption: output/2026-07-17/the-pentagon-s-space-development-agency-hasn-t-moved-as-fast-as-anyone.txt
